text:
Created attachment 182115
devel/py27-setuptools_scm-1.15.5.diff

Updated devel/py-setuptools to 1.15.5 [1]. Added NO_ARCH=yes. This is needed to update security/py-keyrings.alt.

[1] https://github.com/pypa/setuptools_scm/blob/v1.15.5/CHANGELOG.rst

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 103i386, 103amd64)
